scout_targets.title: Manganese Speciation Paradox — Neurotoxicity vs. Radioprotection
scout_targets.field_a: Manganese neurotoxicology (manganism, globus pallidus Mn accumulation, Complex I inhibition)
scout_targets.field_c: Deinococcus radiodurans Mn-antioxidant biology (Mn-OP complexes, DP1 decapeptide, radiation resistance)
bridge_concepts: Mn2+-orthophosphate-peptide (Mn-OP) ternary complexes as SOD mimetics
DP1 decapeptide (Daly lab PNAS 2024) for protective Mn complex formation
Mn speciation determines pro-oxidant vs antioxidant outcome
Mitochondrial Complex I as convergence point
MnSOD-independent non-enzymatic antioxidant defense
scout_targets.notes: Highest-priority deferred target from S009. Exploration slot for contradiction_mining (0 primary sessions). NARROWED: TOP 3.

scout_targets.title: Percolation Theory × Tumor Immune Infiltration Topology
scout_targets.field_a: Percolation theory in neural connectomics (critical thresholds, phase transitions, small-world topology)
scout_targets.field_c: Tumor immune infiltration topology (immune-excluded vs immune-inflamed phenotypes, T-cell spatial organization, tertiary lymphoid structures)
bridge_concepts: Critical percolation threshold p_c as minimum immune cell density for network spanning
Bond percolation: chemokine gradients as bonds, immune cells as nodes
Percolation cluster size distribution predicts power-law scaling of immune infiltrate clusters
Finite-size scaling: tumor size determines sharpness of excluded-to-inflamed transition
Correlation length divergence at p_c predicts immune clustering spatial scale
scout_targets.notes: Satisfies creativity constraint (mathematical structure as bridge). Exploration slot for structural_isomorphism. NARROWED: TOP 3.

scout_targets.title: Cartilage Biphasic Theory × Biofilm Matrix Mechanics
scout_targets.field_a: Cartilage ECM biomechanics (Mow 1980 biphasic theory, FCD, aggregate modulus, triphasic theory)
scout_targets.field_c: Bacterial biofilm matrix mechanics (Psl/Pel/alginate networks, antibiotic penetration, viscoelasticity)
bridge_concepts: Biphasic theory (Mow 1980) governing PDEs identical for cartilage and biofilm
Fixed Charge Density (FCD) — measured in cartilage, NEVER measured in biofilm
Aggregate modulus H_a — standard cartilage parameter, unmeasured in biofilm
Triphasic theory (Lai 1991) for Pel(+)/Psl(0)/alginate(-) charge heterogeneity
Donnan osmotic pressure — quantified in cartilage, qualitative only in biofilm
Hydraulic permeability k — determines antibiotic penetration under loading
scout_targets.notes: S008 adversarial evaluation confirmed mathematical isomorphism and DISJOINT status. Carpio 2019 independently derived Mow-equivalent PDEs. NARROWED: TOP 3.

scout_targets.title: Photovoltaic Degradation Kinetics × Optogenetics Chronic Illumination Toxicity
scout_targets.field_a: Perovskite photovoltaic degradation kinetics (light-induced phase segregation, defect formation, light-soaking recovery)
scout_targets.field_c: Optogenetics chronic illumination toxicity (channelrhodopsin desensitization, phototoxicity, thermal damage)
bridge_concepts: Stretched exponential degradation kinetics for both PV efficiency and opsin desensitization
Light-soaking recovery protocols for optimal illumination duty cycles
Defect formation energy barriers (Arrhenius activation) for permanent vs reversible damage
Ion migration under illumination parallels in both systems
Urbach energy tail analysis for quantifying conformational damage
scout_targets.notes: Novel tool transfer. Risk: analogy may be phenomenological rather than mechanistic. NOT NARROWED.

scout_targets.title: Classical Pharmacokinetics × Quorum Sensing Autoinducer Dynamics
scout_targets.field_a: Classical pharmacokinetics/pharmacometrics (ADME, compartmental models, population PK, therapeutic windows)
scout_targets.field_c: Bacterial quorum sensing autoinducer dynamics (AHL kinetics, signal-to-noise, autoinducer thresholds, lactonase quenching)
bridge_concepts: Compartmental PK models for autoinducer distribution in biofilm architecture
Population PK (popPK) for inter-strain autoinducer production variability
fT>threshold (time above QS threshold) from PK fT>MIC optimization
Michaelis-Menten saturation for lactonase-mediated AHL degradation
AUC/threshold ratio as QS efficacy metric
scout_targets.notes: Clean conceptual isomorphism with ready-to-transfer mathematical tools. EXCLUDED: PARTIALLY_EXPLORED.

scout_targets.title: Hydrothermal Vent Chimney Growth × Bone Mineralization Dynamics
scout_targets.field_a: Submarine hydrothermal vent chimney mineralogy (black smoker formation, precipitation kinetics, self-organizing structures)
scout_targets.field_c: Bone mineralization and remodeling dynamics (osteoblast-mediated hydroxyapatite deposition, Wolff's law, biomineralization)
bridge_concepts: Dissolution-reprecipitation remodeling (abiotic chimneys vs osteoclast-osteoblast)
Classical nucleation theory at templated interfaces
Supersaturation-controlled polymorph selection
Self-organizing channel architecture under flow/mechanical loading
Gradient-driven precipitation kinetics (Tivey 1995 model)
scout_targets.notes: Deep structural parallel. Risk: mineral phase differences may limit quantitative transfer. NOT NARROWED (weaker bridge).

narrowing_rationale: All 3 are DISJOINT with VALID bridges. T5 excluded (PARTIALLY_EXPLORED). T4 and T6 excluded (lower confidence, weaker bridge validation). T1=8.5 contradiction_mining, T3=8.5 structural_isomorphism (S008 verified), T2=7.5 structural_isomorphism (creativity constraint). 3 different strategies represented across top 3 (contradiction_mining, structural_isomorphism x2).
